nasb.text: Then she said, “Give me a blessing; since you have given me the land of the Negev, give me also springs of water.” So he gave her the upper springs and the lower springs.

esv.text: She said to him, “Give me a blessing. Since you have given me the land of the Negeb, give me also springs of water.” And he gave her the upper springs and the lower springs.

cnv.text: 她回答：“求你給我祝福；你既然把南地給了我，求你也把水泉給我。”她父親就把上泉和下泉都給了她。

ccb.text: 押撒答道：“请你赐福给我，你既然把南地给了我，就求你也把水泉赐给我。”迦勒就把上泉和下泉都给了她。
